metadata.falPrompt:
Aged parchment background panel for a medieval RPG character 
screen. Full panel texture, no text, no icons, no UI elements 
baked in. 

Layout suggestion baked into texture only through subtle 
tonal variation:
- Left column (~200px wide): slightly darker parchment tone, 
  suggesting a portrait and stat area
- Right area: open, lighter parchment for content
- Outer border: dark aged wood or leather frame, 
  slightly ornate but not decorative — functional, worn

Texture details: natural parchment grain, faint foxing spots, 
subtle ink stains at edges, slight yellowing toward center. 
Feels like a document that has been handled many times.

Color palette: aged cream, warm ochre, dark brown border, 
shadow blue-gray in the darker column zone.
No text. No symbols. No illustrations. Pure texture panel.
Serious, melancholic, medieval Florentine aesthetic.
Dante's Florence mood — beautiful, faded, quietly worn.
1920x1080 resolution. PNG format.
